'''Yatsuakata Sukune no Kami''' (八縣宿禰神) is an ancient Japanese figure or {{ill|Deity|en|Deity|WD=Q178885|lt=kami}}.

== Overview ==
Yatsuakata Sukune no Kami is also referred to as '''八県宿禰神''', '''箭津安賀多神''' (Yatsuakata no Kami), '''八縣宿祢命''', or '''佐和惠多良六老彦神''' (Saweetara - exact reading unknown - Hiko no Kami). At the {{ill|Shinkai Sansha Shrine|ja|新海三社神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkai Sansha Shrine|qq=}}, Yatsuakata is considered either the child of {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}} or a name for {{ill|Okata no Kami|ja|大縣神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. The offspring, {{ill|Takeshina no Mikoto|ja|健志奈乃命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeshina no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, is described in the ''Suho Suwa Clan Genealogy'' as distinct from {{ill|Takeshina no Mikoto|ja|蓼科神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeshina no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a child of Takeminakata. He is recognized as the progenitor deity of the {{ill|Suwa clan|en|Suwa clan|WD=Q2975376|lt=Suwa clan}}.

The deity first appears in the historical record in the {{ill|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|en|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|WD=Q1052981|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}} as holding the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank|ja|従五位|1=Junior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower. On the 9th day of the 3rd month of {{ill|Zhenguan|en|Zhenguan|WD=Q3577278|lt=Jogan}} 10 (868 CE), Yatsuakata was elevated to the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower.{{Sfn|Nobukazu|1985|p=23}}

== Genealogy ==
[[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|thumb|center|200px|Genealogy of the first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}}]]

Yatsuakata Sukune no Kami is the child of {{ill|Izuhayao no Mikoto|ja|出早雄命|1=Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|qq=}}
, who is himself the son of {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}} and {{ill|Yasakatome|en|Yasakatome|WD=Q9150392|lt=Yasakatome no Kami}}. Yatsuakata's mother may have been {{ill|Tamaru-hime|ja|多満留姫|1=Tamaru-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamaru-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamaru-hime|qq=}}. He had siblings, including {{ill|Kamohagami|ja|可毛羽神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamohagami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493216}}, {{ill|Wakakihime|ja|若木比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakakihime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135492776}}, {{ill|Kusanaihime|ja|草奈井比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kusanaihime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493035}}, {{ill|Izuhayahime|ja|伊津早姫神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayahime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, as well as {{ill|Okata no Kami|ja|大縣神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Uchiakata no Kami|ja|内安賀多神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uchiakata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sotakata no Kami|ja|外安賀多神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sotakata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Some genealogies also include {{ill|Aizu-hime-no-Kami|ja|会津比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aizuhime no Kami|qq=}}, described as either a sibling or offspring of Yatsuakata.{{Sfn|Jinosuke|1912|p=73}}

== Shrines Dedicated to Yatsuakata Sukune no Kami ==
* Former {{ill|Shichisha Myojin|ja|七社明神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichisha Myojin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (now defunct, located in Tamagawa, Chino City, Nagano Prefecture)
* {{ill|Shinkai Sansha Shrine|ja|新海三社神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkai Sansha Shrine|qq=}} (Taguchi Miyashiro, Saku City, Nagano Prefecture)
* {{ill|Goka Hachiman Shrine|ja|五加八幡神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goka Hachiman Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Goka, Ueda City, Nagano Prefecture)
* {{ill|Kirigafuri no Miya|ja|霧降宮切久保諏訪神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirigafuri no Miya|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Kirikubo, Hakuba Village, Nagano Prefecture)

, who is himself the son of {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}} and {{ill|Yasakatome|en|Yasakatome|WD=Q9150392|lt=Yasakatome no Kami}}. Yatsuakata's mother may have been {{ill|Tamaru-hime|ja|多満留姫|1=Tamaru-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamaru-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamaru-hime|qq=}}. He had siblings, including {{ill|Kamohagami|ja|可毛羽神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamohagami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493216}}, {{ill|Wakakihime|ja|若木比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakakihime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135492776}}, {{ill|Kusanaihime|ja|草奈井比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kusanaihime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493035}}, {{ill|Izuhayahime|ja|伊津早姫神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayahime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, as well as {{ill|Okata no Kami|ja|大縣神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Uchiakata no Kami|ja|内安賀多神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uchiakata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sotakata no Kami|ja|外安賀多神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sotakata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Some genealogies also include {{ill|Aizu-hime-no-Kami|ja|会津比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aizuhime no Kami|qq=}}, described as either a sibling or offspring of Yatsuakata.{{Sfn|Jinosuke|1912|p=73}}

== Shrines Dedicated to Yatsuakata Sukune no Kami ==
* Former {{ill|Shichisha Myojin|ja|七社明神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichisha Myojin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (now defunct, located in Tamagawa, Chino City, Nagano Prefecture)
* {{ill|Shinkai Sansha Shrine|ja|新海三社神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkai Sansha Shrine|qq=}} (Taguchi Miyashiro, Saku City, Nagano Prefecture)
* {{ill|Goka Hachiman Shrine|ja|五加八幡神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goka Hachiman Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Goka, Ueda City, Nagano Prefecture)
* {{ill|Kirigafuri no Miya|ja|霧降宮切久保諏訪神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirigafuri no Miya|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Kirikubo, Hakuba Village, Nagano Prefecture)

'''Yatsuakata Sukune no Kami''' (八縣宿禰神) is an ancient Japanese figure or {{ill|Deity|en|Deity|WD=Q178885|lt=kami}}.

== Overview ==
Yatsuakata Sukune no Kami is also referred to as '''八県宿禰神''', '''箭津安賀多神''' (Yatsuakata no Kami), '''八縣宿祢命''', or '''佐和惠多良六老彦神''' (Saweetara - exact reading unknown - Hiko no Kami). At the {{ill|Shinkai Sansha Shrine|ja|新海三社神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkai Sansha Shrine|qq=}}, Yatsuakata is considered either the child of {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}} or a name for {{ill|Okata no Kami|ja|大縣神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. The offspring, {{ill|Takeshina no Mikoto|ja|健志奈乃命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeshina no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, is described in the ''Suho Suwa Clan Genealogy'' as distinct from {{ill|Takeshina no Mikoto|ja|蓼科神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeshina no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a child of Takeminakata. He is recognized as the progenitor deity of the {{ill|Suwa clan|en|Suwa clan|WD=Q2975376|lt=Suwa clan}}.

The deity first appears in the historical record in the {{ill|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|en|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|WD=Q1052981|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}} as holding the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank|ja|従五位|1=Junior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower. On the 9th day of the 3rd month of {{ill|Zhenguan|en|Zhenguan|WD=Q3577278|lt=Jogan}} 10 (868 CE), Yatsuakata was elevated to the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower.{{Sfn|Nobukazu|1985|p=23}}

== Genealogy ==
[[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|thumb|center|200px|Genealogy of the first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}}]]

Yatsuakata Sukune no Kami is the child of {{ill|Izuhayao no Mikoto|ja|出早雄命|1=Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|qq=}}
, who is himself the son of {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}} and {{ill|Yasakatome|en|Yasakatome|WD=Q9150392|lt=Yasakatome no Kami}}. Yatsuakata's mother may have been {{ill|Tamaru-hime|ja|多満留姫|1=Tamaru-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamaru-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamaru-hime|qq=}}. He had siblings, including {{ill|Kamohagami|ja|可毛羽神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamohagami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493216}}, {{ill|Wakakihime|ja|若木比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakakihime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135492776}}, {{ill|Kusanaihime|ja|草奈井比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kusanaihime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493035}}, {{ill|Izuhayahime|ja|伊津早姫神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayahime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, as well as {{ill|Okata no Kami|ja|大縣神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Uchiakata no Kami|ja|内安賀多神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uchiakata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sotakata no Kami|ja|外安賀多神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sotakata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Some genealogies also include {{ill|Aizu-hime-no-Kami|ja|会津比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aizuhime no Kami|qq=}}, described as either a sibling or offspring of Yatsuakata.{{Sfn|Jinosuke|1912|p=73}}

== Shrines Dedicated to Yatsuakata Sukune no Kami ==
* Former {{ill|Shichisha Myojin|ja|七社明神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichisha Myojin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (now defunct, located in Tamagawa, Chino City, Nagano Prefecture)
* {{ill|Shinkai Sansha Shrine|ja|新海三社神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkai Sansha Shrine|qq=}} (Taguchi Miyashiro, Saku City, Nagano Prefecture)
* {{ill|Goka Hachiman Shrine|ja|五加八幡神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goka Hachiman Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Goka, Ueda City, Nagano Prefecture)
* {{ill|Kirigafuri no Miya|ja|霧降宮切久保諏訪神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirigafuri no Miya|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Kirikubo, Hakuba Village, Nagano Prefecture)

'''Yatsuakata Sukune no Kami''' (八縣宿禰神) is an ancient Japanese figure or {{ill|Deity|en|Deity|WD=Q178885|lt=kami|1=Deity}}.

== Overview ==
Yatsuakata Sukune no Kami is also referred to as '''八県宿禰神''', '''箭津安賀多神''' (Yatsuakata no Kami), '''八縣宿祢命''', or '''佐和惠多良六老彦神''' (Saweetara - exact reading unknown - Hiko no Kami). At the {{ill|Shinkai Sansha Shrine|ja|新海三社神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkai Sansha Shrine|qq=}}, Yatsuakata is considered either the child of {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}} or a name for {{ill|Okata no Kami|ja|大縣神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. The offspring, {{ill|Takeshina no Mikoto|ja|健志奈乃命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeshina no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, is described in the ''Suho Suwa Clan Genealogy'' as distinct from {{ill|Takeshina no Mikoto|ja|蓼科神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeshina no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a child of Takeminakata. He is recognized as the progenitor deity of the {{ill|Suwa clan|en|Suwa clan|WD=Q2975376|lt=Suwa clan|1=Suwa clan}}.

The deity first appears in the historical record in the {{ill|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|en|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|WD=Q1052981|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}} as holding the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank|ja|従五位|1=Junior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower. On the 9th day of the 3rd month of {{ill|Zhenguan|en|Zhenguan|WD=Q3577278|lt=Jogan|1=Zhenguan}} 10 (868 CE), Yatsuakata was elevated to the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower.{{Sfn|Nobukazu|1985|p=23}}

== Genealogy ==
[[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|thumb|center|200px|Genealogy of the first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}}]]

Yatsuakata Sukune no Kami is the child of {{ill|Izuhayao no Mikoto|ja|出早雄命|1=Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|qq=}}
, who is himself the son of {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}} and {{ill|Yasakatome|en|Yasakatome|WD=Q9150392|lt=Yasakatome no Kami|1=Yasakatome}}. Yatsuakata's mother may have been {{ill|Tamaru-hime|ja|多満留姫|1=Tamaru-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamaru-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamaru-hime|qq=}}. He had siblings, including {{ill|Kamohagami|ja|可毛羽神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamohagami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493216|1=Kamoha no Kami}}, {{ill|Wakakihime|ja|若木比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakakihime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135492776|1=Wakakihime-no-Kami}}, {{ill|Kusanaihime|ja|草奈井比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kusanaihime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493035|1=Kusanoi-hime}}, {{ill|Izuhayahime|ja|伊津早姫神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayahime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, as well as {{ill|Okata no Kami|ja|大縣神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Uchiakata no Kami|ja|内安賀多神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uchiakata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sotakata no Kami|ja|外安賀多神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sotakata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Some genealogies also include {{ill|Aizu-hime-no-Kami|ja|会津比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aizuhime no Kami|qq=}}, described as either a sibling or offspring of Yatsuakata.{{Sfn|Jinosuke|1912|p=73}}

== Shrines Dedicated to Yatsuakata Sukune no Kami ==
* Former {{ill|Shichisha Myojin|ja|七社明神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichisha Myojin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (now defunct, located in Tamagawa, Chino City, Nagano Prefecture)
* {{ill|Shinkai Sansha Shrine|ja|新海三社神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkai Sansha Shrine|qq=}} (Taguchi Miyashiro, Saku City, Nagano Prefecture)
* {{ill|Goka Hachiman Shrine|ja|五加八幡神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goka Hachiman Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Goka, Ueda City, Nagano Prefecture)
* {{ill|Kirigafuri no Miya|ja|霧降宮切久保諏訪神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirigafuri no Miya|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Kirikubo, Hakuba Village, Nagano Prefecture)

'''Yatsuakata Sukune no Kami''' (八縣宿禰神) is an ancient Japanese figure or {{ill|Deity|en|Deity|WD=Q178885|lt=kami|1=Deity}}.

== Overview ==
Yatsuakata Sukune no Kami is also referred to as '''八県宿禰神''', '''箭津安賀多神''' (Yatsuakata no Kami), '''八縣宿祢命''', or '''佐和惠多良六老彦神''' (Saweetara - exact reading unknown - Hiko no Kami). == Genealogy ==
[[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|thumb|center|200px|Genealogy of the first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}}]]

Yatsuakata Sukune no Kami is the child of {{ill|Izuhayao no Mikoto|ja|出早雄命|1=Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|qq=}}
, who is himself the son of {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}} and {{ill|Yasakatome|en|Yasakatome|WD=Q9150392|lt=Yasakatome no Kami|1=Yasakatome}}. Yatsuakata's mother may have been {{ill|Tamaru-hime|ja|多満留姫|1=Tamaru-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamaru-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamaru-hime|qq=}}. He had siblings, including {{ill|Kamohagami|ja|可毛羽神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamohagami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493216|1=Kamoha no Kami}}, {{ill|Wakakihime|ja|若木比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakakihime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135492776|1=Wakakihime-no-Kami}}, {{ill|Kusanaihime|ja|草奈井比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kusanaihime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493035|1=Kusanoi-hime}}, {{ill|Izuhayahime|ja|伊津早姫神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayahime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, as well as {{ill|Okata no Kami|ja|大縣神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Uchiakata no Kami|ja|内安賀多神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uchiakata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sotakata no Kami|ja|外安賀多神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sotakata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. '''Yatsuakata Sukune no Kami''' (八縣宿禰神) is an ancient Japanese figure or {{ill|Deity|en|Deity|WD=Q178885|lt=kami|1=Deity}}.

== Overview ==
Yatsuakata Sukune no Kami is also referred to as '''八県宿禰神''', '''箭津安賀多神''' (Yatsuakata no Kami), '''八縣宿祢命''', or '''佐和惠多良六老彦神''' (Saweetara - exact reading unknown - Hiko no Kami). At the {{ill|Shinkai Sansha Shrine|ja|新海三社神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkai Sansha Shrine|qq=}}, Yatsuakata is considered either the child of {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}} or a name for {{ill|Okata no Kami|ja|大縣神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. The offspring, {{ill|Takeshina no Mikoto|ja|健志奈乃命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeshina no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, is described in the ''Suho Suwa Clan Genealogy'' as distinct from {{ill|Takeshina no Mikoto|ja|蓼科神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeshina no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a child of Takeminakata. He is recognized as the progenitor deity of the {{ill|Suwa clan|en|Suwa clan|WD=Q2975376|lt=Suwa clan|1=Suwa clan}}.

The deity first appears in the historical record in the {{ill|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|en|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|WD=Q1052981|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}} as holding the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank|ja|従五位|1=Junior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower. On the 9th day of the 3rd month of {{ill|Zhenguan|en|Zhenguan|WD=Q3577278|lt=Jogan|1=Zhenguan}} 10 (868 CE), Yatsuakata was elevated to the Rank of {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} Lower.{{Sfn|Nobukazu|1985|p=23}}

== Genealogy ==
[[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|thumb|center|200px|Genealogy of the first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}}]]

Yatsuakata Sukune no Kami is the child of {{ill|Izuhayao no Mikoto|ja|出早雄命|1=Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|qq=}}
, who is himself the son of {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}} and {{ill|Yasakatome|en|Yasakatome|WD=Q9150392|lt=Yasakatome no Kami|1=Yasakatome}}. Yatsuakata's mother may have been {{ill|Tamaru-hime|ja|多満留姫|1=Tamaru-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamaru-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamaru-hime|qq=}}. He had siblings, including {{ill|Kamohagami|ja|可毛羽神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamohagami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493216|1=Kamoha no Kami}}, {{ill|Wakakihime|ja|若木比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakakihime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135492776|1=Wakakihime-no-Kami}}, {{ill|Kusanaihime|ja|草奈井比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kusanaihime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135493035|1=Kusanoi-hime}}, {{ill|Izuhayahime|ja|伊津早姫神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayahime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, as well as {{ill|Okata no Kami|ja|大縣神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Uchiakata no Kami|ja|内安賀多神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uchiakata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Sotakata no Kami|ja|外安賀多神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sotakata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Some genealogies also include {{ill|Aizu-hime-no-Kami|ja|会津比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aizuhime no Kami|qq=}}, described as either a sibling or offspring of Yatsuakata.{{Sfn|Jinosuke|1912|p=73}}

== Shrines Dedicated to Yatsuakata Sukune no Kami ==
* Former {{ill|Shichisha Myojin|ja|七社明神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichisha Myojin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (now defunct, located in Tamagawa, Chino City, Nagano Prefecture)
* {{ill|Shinkai Sansha Shrine|ja|新海三社神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkai Sansha Shrine|qq=}} (Taguchi Miyashiro, Saku City, Nagano Prefecture)
* {{ill|Goka Hachiman Shrine|ja|五加八幡神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goka Hachiman Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Goka, Ueda City, Nagano Prefecture)
* {{ill|Kirigafuri no Miya|ja|霧降宮切久保諏訪神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirigafuri no Miya|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Kirikubo, Hakuba Village, Nagano Prefecture)
